markdownRemark.html:
As salāmu ʿalaikum

Due to some change in the program, this lecture will be open to both BROTHERS AND SISTERS. However, please be prepared that only one lecture will be given at the discretion of the speaker (brother Nādir).

Bārak Allāhu fīkum

frontmatter.title: Program Change: Lecture for Brothers & Sisters On Either One Of 'Lecture on The Muslim's Stance In The Time Of Fitnah' or 'Advice to the Spouses'
2 Lectures for brothers only, on 'The Stance of the Muslims' in Times of Fitnah & 'Advice to the Spouses'
Dar al-Hadith presents The Book of Purification
